name: BernieSanders.com
subject: NEW AD: $27
body:
#
We talk a lot about the average contribution to our campaign, sisters and brothers. Do you know what it is?
It's $27. (Of course you knew that. It's just so fun to say.)
We think $27 is so important because it stands in such stark contrast to how seemingly everyone else runs for president: **huge contributions from the billionaire class, lobbyists bundling hundreds of thousands of dollars, or, as Hillary Clinton did last night, hosting dinners with a top price tag of $353,400.**
So while Hillary Clinton hosted her $353,400 dinner last night in San Francisco, we ran an ad on TV to tell San Francisco voters that we do things differently. We're doing it again tonight in Los Angeles during another big fundraiser. The ad is called "$27."
[**Watch our new ad about how our campaign is powered by $27 contributions, and chip in your own $27 to continue this critical work to challenge our corrupt campaign finance system.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/27-ad?refcode=em160416-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/27-ad?refcode=em160416-full")
**[Watch the ad
& chip in $27](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/27-ad?refcode=em160416-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/27-ad?refcode=em160416-full")**
It seems like everyone knows what our average contribution is. Even at this week's debate, the audience shouted "TWENTY SEVEN DOLLARS" before Bernie could finish his sentence about the average contribution to our campaign.
More than 2 million people have contributed almost 7 million times because they want to make Bernie Sanders our next president. At an average of $27 apiece, we are showing that there is another way to run campaigns - one that cuts out the billionaire class. They don't like that very much, and that's why they're trying to stop us.
[**Contribute $27 to our campaign right now to show the political and financial establishment that we can compete with their corrupt campaign finance system - and that we can win.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/27-ad?refcode=em160416-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/27-ad?refcode=em160416-full")
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/27-ad?refcode=em160416-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/27-ad?refcode=em160416-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Mike Mikus
subject: Almost out of time
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/766558736423583744/19726338113929216?refcode=e20160417&refcode2=e20160417nd&amount=25)
---
Here's the truth, friend:

I don't know what's going to happen on Primary Day next week. I want to believe Katie's message will resonate with Pennsylvania voters and she will be the candidate to take on Pat Toomey and win in November.

**But there are still _thousands_ of undecided voters in Pennsylvania, and those voters are going to make the difference.** We can reach them, and let them know about Katie's vision for the Keystone State, but that's going to mean running ads from now until Election Day. And those don't come cheap.

**We still need to raise $6,200 by midnight TOMORROW -- the final deadline to wire funds for our last ad buy of the primary campaign.[Will you chip in today to help us make it through this final primary push?](https://act.myngp.com/el/766558736423583744/19726338113929216?refcode=e20160417&refcode2=e20160417nd&amount=25)**

The more people who hear Katie's message, the more supporters she gains. That's why she's jumped 14 points since March 1st and is rapidly closing in on her primary opponent, making this a dead heat race.

I can't predict the future, but I do know this: If enough of Katie's supporters chip in before our Monday deadline, we will have the resources to reach undecided voters across the Commonwealth and keep our momentum going.

[**Donate $5 or whatever you can today to help get Katie 's message out on the airwaves before Primary Day. Katie needs you now >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/766558736423583744/19726338113929216?refcode=e20160417&refcode2=e20160417nd&amount=25)

Sincerely,

Mike Mikus
Campaign Manager
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/766558736423583744/19726338113929216?refcode=e20160417&refcode2=e20160417nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/766558736423583744/-52612730900709376).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Bernie! Bernie! Bernie!
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
If you watched last week's Brooklyn debate until the end, you caught one of the moments of the campaign. As Bernie concluded his closing remarks, the crowd went wild for ten seconds.
But it wasn't over. That's when the chants started, "Bernie! Bernie! Bernie!"
Secretary Clinton stood on the stage for almost 30 seconds smiling as she realized Bernie Sanders won the debate, right in her backyard. But now we have a primary to win. **We 've fought our way back from down 48 points in New York one month ago, but it will require a bit more from everyone to get over the hump:**
[**Right now, thousands of people are making $2.70 contributions to Bernie 's campaign. If you add yours we are going to have the resources to win New York, the Democratic primary, and take our country back from the billionaire class.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/the-debate-in-brooklyn?refcode=em160417-v2 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/the-debate-in-brooklyn?refcode=em160417-v2")
[](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/the-debate-in-brooklyn?refcode=em160417-v2 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/the-debate-in-brooklyn?refcode=em160417-v2")
_(The time from "Thank you!" to the end of this GIF is all cheers and chants. It was amazing.)_
The political establishment was in shock after last week's debate. Can you imagine their panic if we do well on Tuesday night? And we can, but only if we keep fighting against the millionaires and billionaires funding Hillary Clinton's campaign.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/the-debate-in-brooklyn?refcode=em160417-v2 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/the-debate-in-brooklyn?refcode=em160417-v2")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Team Sestak
subject: Down to just 7 in Cresco
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719980/3476a20e/d9ec2c3/27421cfb/1416505164/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, After just three days, we are almost halfway toward making our $100,000 fundraising goal for Joe to afford the TV ads he needs to win. In fact, _**we 're down to just needing **__**7 people in Cresco to chip in!**_ | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719980/3476a20e/d9ec2c3/27421cfa/1416505164/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0417FBEOP4b1&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700")
---
We are up against almost $4 million in outside spending. Much of it is being used for attack ads making claims about Joe that independent fact checkers have found to be false.
People know Joe, Peter, and they know the attacks are false. We're still up in the polls, but to keep the lead we need people from each town to chip in what they can.
We only need 7 more people in Cresco... let's do it!
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719980/3476a20e/d9ec2c3/27421cf9/1416505164/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0417FBEOP4b2&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700")
---
Respectfully,
Team Sestak

name: Team Katie
subject: off pace
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/6379173070568947712/-7690436223944359936?refcode=e20160417.2&refcode2=e20160417.2nd&amount=25)
---
We're off pace, friend, and 8 days out from Election Day is not when we want to be falling behind.

To win her primary next week, Katie needs to reach out to as many undecided voters as possible. But to fully fund our aggressive media plan that will put enough ads on the airwaves to spread Katie's message across the Commonwealth, **we still need to raise $5,434 by midnight tomorrow.**

[**Rush a donation to Katie right now, it can 't wait!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6379173070568947712/-7690436223944359936?refcode=e20160417.2&refcode2=e20160417.2nd&amount=25)

Katie's race is a dead heat. If we don't reach out to enough voters now, we'll lose on Primary Day.

[**Chip in $5 or whatever you can now so Katie has the resources to win her primary and take back the Senate for Democrats in November.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6379173070568947712/-7690436223944359936?refcode=e20160417.2&refcode2=e20160417.2nd&amount=25)

Thanks,

Team Katie

name: Joe Sestak
subject: How false will one get in order to just win?
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719996/3476a20e/d9f677c/27421d57/1178893643/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, It's disappointing that my Democratic opponent will falsely rewrite history in order to win. My opponent's new false ad says _I voted against making CEOs give excessive bonuses**back to corporations**_ ... when I actually voted to instead mandate _return_ _of excessive CEO bonuses**to the taxpayers that had saved the bailed-out corporations!**_ | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719996/3476a20e/d9f677c/27421d56/1178893643/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0417FB2b1&amounts=10,20,30,40,50,100,500")
---
[Peter, this false ad has half a million dollars behind it....can you help me counter it with a contribution of $10, $20, $30, $40, $50, or more...we have to win, but based on the truth.](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719996/3476a20e/d9f677c/27421d55/1178893643/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0417FB2p1&amounts=10,20,30,40,50,100,500")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719996/3476a20e/d9f677c/27421d54/1178893643/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0417FB2b2&amounts=10,20,30,40,50,100,500")
---
**I was proud to vote for the toughest crackdown on Wall Street in history** (Dodd-Frank) to reform predatory lending, regulate the risky financial transactions that led to the financial crisis, give shareholders a vote on executive pay, and create the Consumer Finance Protection Bureau.
[But you wouldn't recognize this from my opponent's false ads. **Help me fight back** with a contribution of $10, $20, $30 or more, so that I can continue this fight in Washington DC, putting people above party or type.](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719996/3476a20e/d9f677c/27421d53/1178893643/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0417FB2p2&amounts=10,20,30,40,50,100,500")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719996/3476a20e/d9f677c/27421d52/1178893643/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0417FB2b3&amounts=10,20,30,40,50,100,500")
---
Warmly,
Joe

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719996/3476a20e/d9f677c/27421d51/1178893643/VEsB/ "https://www.facebook.com/joesestak")[
](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719996/3476a20e/d9f677c/27421d50/1178893643/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=Footer")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719996/3476a20e/d9f677c/27421d5f/1178893643/VEsP/ "http://joesestak.com/") |
---|---|---

Media, PA 19063

name: Katherine Van Hollen
subject: when are you voting?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|

>
> Friend,
>
> With just a few days of early voting left and Primary Day just 9 days away one thing is certain: this is going to be close. Every vote -your vote friend - could be the one that helps tip the balance.
>
> You're getting this email as part of Team Van Hollen, so I'm sure you're already planning to vote. But the best way to ensure you actually get out to the polls is to make a plan. If you haven't already, get started now.
>
> **Are you planning to: ** | ****[Vote Early](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d5c/70cdc2ba/47db6d76/396f745/587179552/VEsH/ "http://vanhollen.org/early-voting/?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Vote+Early&utm_campaign=em41716&source=em41716")****
> ---
> ****[Vote On Election Day](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d5c/70cdc2ba/47db6d76/396f742/587179552/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/election-day-voters?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Vote+On+Election+Day&utm_campaign=em41716&source=em41716")****
> ---
> ****[Volunteer On Election Day](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d5c/70cdc2ba/47db6d76/396f743/587179552/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/April-volunteers?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Volunteer+On+Election+Day&utm_campaign=em41716&source=em41716")****
> ---
> You've done so much for Chris already, but we need you to go one step further. Please make a plan for when you'll be voting and then get out to the polls. If you are available to volunteer to door knock for Chris in key areas between now and April 26 **[click here to let me know.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d5c/70cdc2ba/47db6d76/396f740/587179552/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/April-volunteers?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+click+here+to+let+me+know&utm_campaign=em41716&source=em41716")**
>
> We're so close to winning this race and proving that a people powered campaign can succeed in the face of big money SuperPAC opposition. Let's finish strong.
>
> Thank you for everything and I hope to see you at the polls!
>
> Best,
>
> Katherine ****[DONATE](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d5c/70cdc2ba/47db6d76/396f741/587179552/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhapril?refcode=em4172016&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em41716&source=em41716")****
> ---
>
>

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d5c/70cdc2ba/47db6d76/396f75e/587179552/VEsA/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em41716&source=em41716") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Bernie’s false claim about you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
Let's show them just how enthusiastic you are | Friend --

Bernie Sanders once again is claiming that his campaign has a monopoly on enthusiasm in this election.

You and I should take that personally. It’s both demonstrably false and entirely dismissive of the incredible work you've put in over the last year.

**[With two days to go before New York votes, will you chip in to claim your free Team Hillary sticker and show Senator Sanders just how enthusiastic you are?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUyNjIzNzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNjY1NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Let’s break this down:

Hillary Clinton has 2.4 million more votes than Senator Sanders. She’s won in every corner of the country -- from Florida to Massachusetts, Illinois to North Carolina. She’s got more votes and more pledged delegates, and with more than one million donors standing with her, I’d say she’s got a whole lot of enthusiasm on her side.

**I'm proud of this campaign, of this team, and of Hillary Clinton. She needs this enthusiastic, diverse, and powerful team to help her win big in New York. Send Senator Sanders a message, chip in now, and let's go:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUyNjIzNzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNjY1NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUyNjIzNzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNjY1NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Christina

Christina Reynolds
Deputy Communications Director
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjUyNjIzNzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNjY1NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjUyNjIzNzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNjY1NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjUyNjIzNzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNjY1NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjUyNjIzNzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNjY1NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjUyNjIzNzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNjY1NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUyNjIzNzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNjY1NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjUyNjIzNzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNjY1NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjUyNjIzNzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNjY1NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjUyNjIzNzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNjY1NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjUyNjIzNzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNjY1NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjUyNjIzNzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNjY1NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUyNjIzNzES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgyNjY1NjUyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: [SHOCK NY Poll] Clinton: 53% - Sanders: 47%
body:
#
Here we come, sisters and brothers. One month ago, we were down 48 points in New York. With just two days to go until the primary, we've cut the lead in Hillary Clinton's home state all the way down to six.
**Gravis Poll - New York Democratic Primary**
Hillary Clinton: 53%
Bernie Sanders: 47%
Here's the truth: we don't have to win New York on Tuesday, but we have to pick up a lot of delegates. This poll shows that if we keep fighting, we may actually have a chance to do both. It'd be the most shocking upset in modern political history. That's why we have to ask:
[**Right now, thousands of people are making $2.70 contributions to Bernie 's campaign. If you add yours we are going to have the resources to win New York, the Democratic primary, and take our country back from the billionaire class.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/shock-ny-poll?refcode=em160417-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/shock-ny-poll?refcode=em160417-full")
The political establishment was already in shock when last week's debate in Brooklyn ended with the crowd chanting Bernie! Bernie! Bernie! after Bernie's closing statement. On Hillary Clinton's home turf! Can you imagine their panic if we do well on Tuesday night? And we can, but only if we keep fighting against the millionaires and billionaires funding Hillary Clinton's campaign.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/shock-ny-poll?refcode=em160417-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/shock-ny-poll?refcode=em160417-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Joe Sestak
subject: In my profession, you couldn't just decide not to show up
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199a9/3476a20e/d9c05d2/27421256/3141915070/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, My passion is to restore the American Dream by integrity of service that gains the bipartisan support needed to advance our domestic agenda. But it is my national security profession that makes me most worried why my Democratic Party's leadership is backing the wrong candidate in this race - as it did the last war. This week, our Secretary of Defense visited two U.S. aircraft carriers in the South China Sea to dispute the Chinese Navy's territorial claim to international waters, and made two military agreements with India and the Philippines against Chinese aggression; headlines announced a new race for the latest class of precise nuclear arms by China, Russia and the United States that threatens to revive the Cold War, along with U.S. plans to step up its military campaign against ISIS, as Russian military aircraft flew across the bow of a U.S. Navy ship 30 times in what the administration called "simulated attack" passes. **Meanwhile, we held a Senatorial foreign policy debate in Erie, and my primary opponent decided not to show up ... but she did attend the Philadelphia Trial Lawyers' board meeting that day.** | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199a9/3476a20e/d9c05d2/27421255/3141915070/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0417FB3b1&amounts=15,25,35,50,100,150,500")
---
You cannot just decide not to show up for the most important vote you can take in the U.S. Senate - the vote to go to war - although I bet there are a lot of Democratic Senators (including the top two in leadership today) who wished they could have avoided the wrong vote they took for the Iraq war 14 years ago.
So few Senators know much about national security policy, today, and just want to avoid it; unfortunately, at the unexpected moment most needed (e.g., Iraq) they lack the credibility and/or courage of conviction to stand up when the war drums are beating and oppose it; or, as importantly, be present every day to stand and shape the debate on the right approach to an increasingly dangerous world - which is why the absence of my opponent from the debate is worrisome, continuing a trend of DSCC-selected candidates that "just say yes" versus bringing experience and gravitas to the highest "body politic" of our land.
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199a9/3476a20e/d9c05d2/27421254/3141915070/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0417FB3b2&amounts=15,25,35,50,100,150,500")
---
It's more than my 31 years in war and national security policy making I want to bring, or having backpacked through China, from Beijing to Hong Kong, the first year they permitted individual travel in the 1980s for Americans. It involved being called from Air Force One on what China was doing with "take orders" on our aircraft close to their true territorial waters, and then being present in the White House as war plans were reviewed and carriers were deployed off Taiwan as Chinese missiles rained down around the Island. It was developing the National Security Strategy of Engagement for the country to approach such a world, and advocating - against senior naval officer opposition - for a new approach to our naval presence in the Western Pacific ... one that is now belatedly being followed as a demonstration to our friends and to China that we are an "honest broker" in Asia, with the capability to maintain peace through security that can prevent crises from becoming conflicts in such a dynamic region. And it was heading the Navy's nuclear strategy division, and then being on the Ploughshares Board whose focus is nuclear disarmament.
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199a9/3476a20e/d9c05d2/27421253/3141915070/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0417FB3b3&amounts=15,25,35,50,100,150,500")
---
There was much more over the past years, even as I continued after Congress to write editorials about how we must fundamentally retool our strategy and our presence worldwide - or as then-Secretary of State Clinton asked me to be on group that worked with China on what was later cited as the "one bright spot" with that nation - and I include below just two of my writings on China and Asia.
That is some of the reckless shame of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee's decision to spend millions - and guide more millions - in outside spending against me in this primary. They want control over a vote, and have lost sight in having those with the right ideas both for our people, and for our country's national security.
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199a9/3476a20e/d9c05d2/27421252/3141915070/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0417FB3b4&amounts=15,25,35,50,100,150,500")
---
And because it's not like the Democratic Party has this national security experience just hanging around the Senate, [I ask you to contribute so they have someone who does, with $15, $25, $35, $50, $100, $150, or what you can send our way - in order to send me to serve our nation, again.](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199a9/3476a20e/d9c05d2/27421255/3141915070/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0417FB3b1&amounts=15,25,35,50,100,150,500")
Thank you and warmly,
Joe
The two editorials are [here](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199a9/3476a20e/d9c05d2/27421251/3141915070/VEsB/ "http://www.philly.com/philly/opinion/currents/20151112_Don_t_let_China_disrupt_peace.html") and [here](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199a9/3476a20e/d9c05d2/27421250/3141915070/VEsO/ "http://www.pottsmerc.com/article/MP/20150922/NEWS/150929917").

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199a9/3476a20e/d9c05d2/2742125f/3141915070/VEsP/ "https://www.facebook.com/joesestak")[
](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199a9/3476a20e/d9c05d2/2742125e/3141915070/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=Footer")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199a9/3476a20e/d9c05d2/2742125d/3141915070/VEsHBA/ "http://joesestak.com/") |
---|---|---
| Friends of Joe Sestak
P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [Unsubscribe](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/17199a9/3476a20e/d9c05d2/2742125c/3141915070/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.joesestak.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") |
